chunks.text: Course: EE 230C | EECS at UC Berkeley EE 230C. Solid State Electronics Catalog Description: Crystal structure and symmetries. Energy-band theory. Cyclotron resonance. Tensor effective mass. Statistics of electronic state population. Recombination theory. Carrier transport theory. Interface properties. Optical processes and properties. Units: 3 Also Offered As: ELENG 230C Prerequisites: EL ENG 131; and PHYSICS 137B. Formats: Spring: 3 hours of lecture per week Fall: 3 hours of lecture per week Grading Basis: Student Option Final Exam Status: Yes Links: EECS Course Archives (CalNet authentication required) CS enrollment policies EE enrollment policies HKN course maps
